settingsPage.title: Connect your own agents
settingsPage.description: Rollorian remains the source of truth for your reading data. From here you can issue scoped credentials so your own assistant, scripts, or MCP clients can read context and apply reading events safely.

errors.generic: The request could not be completed. Please try again.

agents.title: Connections, scopes, and credentials
agents.description: Create dedicated agent connections per user, limit what they can do, rotate tokens, and review recent usage before exposing MCP publicly.

cards.apiBody: The canonical surface. All companions and MCP adapters should go through /api/agent/v1.
cards.privateMcpBody: Run your private MCP on the Pi 5 and point it at a user-scoped Agent API token.
cards.publicMcpBody: The public Vercel-hosted MCP can ship later on top of the same scopes, audit trail, and contracts.

create.title: Create a new connection
create.description: Each connection should represent one agent or one automation entry point.

token.title: Copy the credential now
token.description: The raw token is only shown once. After that you keep only the prefix and rotation controls.
token.warning: Store this token in your agent environment or secret manager right away.
token.empty: Create a connection or issue a fresh token to reveal a new credential.

instructions.title: Quick start
instructions.api: Use the Agent API directly for scripts, automations, or assistants that do not speak MCP.
instructions.mcp: Use the same token in your private MCP package so desktop agents can call Rollorian tools.

connections.title: Existing connections
connections.description: Every connection maps to one user-owned agent client and can carry multiple revocable credentials.
connections.count: {count, plural, =0 {No connections} one {# connection} other {# connections}}
connections.empty: No agent connections exist yet for this account.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.description: Audit events written by the Agent API appear here, including rejected and failed calls.
activity.empty: No agent activity has been recorded yet.

scopeDescription.profile:read: Read the owner profile and connection metadata.
scopeDescription.summary:read: Read the compact reading summary used by assistants.
scopeDescription.library:read: Read the complete library snapshot with semantic states.
scopeDescription.lists:read: Read custom lists and their item counts.
scopeDescription.recommendations:read: Read personalized recommendations based on your graph.
scopeDescription.books:resolve: Resolve references against the user library without mutating data.
scopeDescription.reading-events:write: Apply started, finished, rated, noted, paused, or abandoned events.

admin.heading: Admin Panel
admin.description: Manage users and invitations for the platform.
admin.inviteError: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.

home.emptyDescription: Search for books and save them to your personal library.
home.currentlyReadingEmpty: You're not reading anything. Pick your next book!
home.recommendationsEmpty: Follow more people or add books to get recommendations.
home.upNextEmpty: No books in your queue. Find something new!

library.heading: Your Library
library.description: Manage your personal book collection. Track what you're reading, what you want to read, and what you've already finished.

statusEmpty.TO_READ: No books waiting to be read.
statusEmpty.READING: You're not reading anything right now.
statusEmpty.READ: You haven't marked any books as read yet.

library.batchSuccess: {count, plural, one {# book moved} other {# books moved}}

search.heading: Explore books
search.inputLabel: Search by title, author or ISBN
search.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to scan barcodes
search.cameraNotSupported: Barcode scanning is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Safari.

book.notesPlaceholder: Write something useful about this book.
book.trackDescription: Save it to your library to keep track of your reading progress.

profile.noBooksSignIn: Sign in to follow and see their books
profile.ownBooksEmpty: You haven't added any books yet.

groups.heading: Groups
groups.description: Share and discover books with your reading groups.
groups.noGroups: You're not in any groups yet.
groups.noGroupsDescription: Create a group and invite friends to share your reading activity.
groups.createError: Failed to create group. Please try again.
groups.noBooks: No books in this group yet.
groups.noBooksDescription: Members need to add books to their library first.
groups.inviteError: Failed to invite user. Please try again.
groups.forbidden: You don't have access to this group.
groups.emptyCatalogDescription: Members need to add books to their library first.

lists.title: My Lists
lists.name: List name
lists.createFirst: Create your first list to organize your books
lists.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Books won't be deleted from your library.
lists.emptyList: No books in this list yet
lists.emptyListDescription: Add books from your library or search results

recommendations.heading: Readers Also Read
recommendations.readerCount: {count, plural, one {# reader} other {# readers}} in your circle
recommendations.noRecommendations: Follow readers or join groups to get recommendations

stats.title: Reading Stats
stats.noStreak: Start reading to build your streak!
stats.startReading: Add some books to see your stats

people.heading: People
people.description: Find readers and discover what they're reading.
people.emptyDescription: Follow other readers to discover books and get recommendations based on their taste.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.
errors.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
